title: VenturelandUtils
description: Small client side mod to add QoL for Ventureland server
body:
# VenturelandUtils
VenturelandUtils is a small client side mod to add some Quality of Life.

This mod was a comission by Wiatrak16 & Sacdj. <3

## Features:
- Cooldown Timers:
  - Scroll of Life
  - Revenge
  - Revive scroll
- Cosmic Ward Hud Display
- Hitboxes:
  - Hitboxes of invisible entities now are shown
  - Denylist for showing entity hitboxes (Default: `armor_stand, wither, item_frame`)
